title: Trollius stenopetalus
taxonomy: Trollius stenopetalus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its leaf structure and flower morphology. Trollius stenopetalus is further classified as a member of the genus Trollius, which includes several other species of anemone-flowered plants. The specific classification of Trollius stenopetalus is Trollius stenopetalus (Fisch. ex DC.) Benth. ex Franch.
